nodes.title: Klein notes:
widgets_values:
# 使用说明
### 在 CivitAi 上关注我 [HERE](https://civitai.com/user/lonecatone23)
### Instagram: [synth.studio.models](https://www.instagram.com/synth.studio.models/)
### 这代表数百小时的工作成果。如果你喜欢，请 👍点赞、💬评论，欢迎 ⚡打赏 😉

## 通用注意事项：
### 🛑 不要手动绕过任何部分！请使用快速绕过器或对应区域的开关！
- 不要给模型加组，否则会干扰 bypass repeater
- 我安装了 sage attention，处理时间缩短了约1/3，图像质量不受影响。如果不适合你的设备，可以绕过、安装 Flash attention，或者直接移除。
- 这个工作流逻辑比较直观。主要注意 **Flux Guidance**：有参考图时如果 Guidance 调太高，会导致一致性很差。经过测试，**1** 和 **3.5** 效果最好。
- 另外，据我所知，Detailers 目前无法与 Flux2 配合使用。我找了替代方案没找到，所以用 Flux1D 来做细节处理。如果有人知道更好的方法，请告诉我。
### ***Flux 2 Klein*** ⚠️ 如果出现错误 "ValueError: Got [32, 32, 32, 32] but expected positional dim 64"，说明你需要更新 ComfyUI

## 💾 除非开启，否则什么都不会保存！
### 💾 保存相关信息：
- 📂 标签在 “Save Group” 组里，想改就在那里调整

## 模型
### Flux 2D Base
- Flux 2D 模型（需先同意条款）：[https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev/tree/main](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev/tree/main)
- Flux 2D GGUF 模型：[https://huggingface.co/gguf-org/flux2-dev-gguf/tree/main](https://huggingface.co/gguf-org/flux2-dev-gguf/tree/main)
- Flux 2D Mistral 文本编码器：[https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)
- Flux 2Dev Turbo LoRA：[https://civitai.com/models/2266313/flux2-dev-turbo-lora?modelVersionId=2550958](https://civitai.com/models/2266313/flux2-dev-turbo-lora?modelVersionId=2550958)

### Flux 2 Klein 模型 & 文本编码器
**Klein 4b**
- 文本编码器：[qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)
- Flux 2 Klein 扩散模型：[Flux-2-klein-base-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-4b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-base-4b-fp8.safetensors)

**Klein 9b**
- 文本编码器：[Qwen_3_8b.safetensors](https://civitai.com/models/2308682/qwen-3-8b-flux-klein-9b-te)
- Flux 2 Klein 9b：[FLUX.2-klein-9B](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B/tree/main)
- [Klein_9b GGUF 模型](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF/tree/main)
- **💡Use this with 9B** [Klein_9b consistency LoRa](https://huggingface.co/dx8152/Flux2-Klein-9B-Consistency)

### VAE（两者通用）
- VAE：[flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)

## 使用说明：
### 模型 / 文本编码器 & LoRA
**模型搭配**
- ⚠️ 模型和文本编码器必须正确搭配
- **Flux 2D（含 GGUF）**：使用 Mistral 文本编码器
- **Flux 2 Klein 4b**：使用 qwen_3_4b 文本编码器
- **Flux 2 Klein 9b**：使用 qwen_3_8b 文本编码器



**LoRA**
- **Turbo LoRA**：可让图像在 8 步内完成处理。（免责声明：我还没测试过）
- ⚠️ 截至本笔记撰写时，Flux 2D 的 LoRA 仅兼容基础模型，还没人做出 Flux 2 Klein 专用的 LoRA。

### CFG：
- Flux 2D（含 GGUF）的 CFG 为 **1.0**
- Flux 2 Klein 的 CFG 可在 **3.5–5.0** 之间调整
- Klein_9b 在 CFG **1.0** 时表现非常好

### 画幅比例节点（Aspect Ratio Node）：
- 使用预设尺寸或自定义尺寸。自定义时记得把预设选为 “custom”
- Prescale：会先缩小你选择的初始尺寸，有助于低显存环境
- Upscale：连接到 SEED VR2
- Hi-rez fix 滑块：控制高分辨率修复的放大倍数。我通常设为 1.5，减轻 SEED VR2 放大器的压力

### Klein Conditioning：
**获取方式 [Here](https://github.com/capitan01R/ComfyUI-Flux2Klein-Enhancer)**
- text_enhance = -1.0 到 2.0　　缩放激活 token 的强度。正值增强提示影响，负值减弱
- detail_sharpen = -1.0 到 2.0　　放大 token 间的差异。正值锐化，负值平滑
- coherence_experimental = 0.0 到 1.0　　token 间的自注意力传递（实验性，建议从 0.1–0.2 开始）
- edit_text_weight = 0.0 到 3.0　　仅图像编辑模式。低于 1.0 保留更多原图，高于 1.0 更严格跟随提示
- edit_blend_mode = 仅图像编辑模式。常见编辑场景的预设配置
- active_token_end = 1 到 512　　激活文本区域的结束位置。默认基于诊断结果

### 高分辨率放大（Hi-REZ upscale）：
- 写实风格推荐：Ultra Sharp、Niclekback 或 Ersgan
- 动漫风格推荐：Anime sharp
- 显存紧张时用底部滑块，增加 tile 数量（减小单块尺寸）。仅在 OOM 或砖块化时使用
- [放大模型下载](https://huggingface.co/uwg/upscaler/tree/main/ESRGAN)
- 如果有噪点（常由劣质 LoRA 引起），这个模型去噪效果稍好：[Denoise Model](https://github.com/cszn/KAIR/releases/download/v1.0/scunet_color_real_gan.pth)

### 细节修复器（Detailers）：
- 确保使用与你风格匹配的 checkpoint（写实 / 动漫等）
- 相应调整采样器和调度器
- 脸部 & 手部检测器：[here](https://huggingface.co/Bingsu/adetailer/tree/main)
- 眼睛模型：[here](https://huggingface.co/jayr23/Eyeful/tree/main)
- **Yolo：V8n 和 V8s 有什么区别？** “n” 是 nano，精度低但显存占用少。尽可能用 S 版（脸部细节修复最常遇到这个问题）

### Seed VR2 放大器：
- [观看这个视频](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MBtWYXq_r60)
- 当前设置为低显存优化。高显存用户可关闭 VAE 的 tiling，然后提高分辨率
- Debug 已开启。查看日志，它会提醒你是否还有余量可以增加分辨率

*自动下载*
- 首次使用时，选中的模型和 VAE 文件会自动下载
- ⚠️ 模型较大，下载可能需要几分钟
- 请留意控制台日志查看下载进度
- 也可手动下载到 📂`ComfyUI\models\SEEDVR2` 目录
- 模型地址：[这里](https://huggingface.co/numz/SeedVR2_comfyUI/tree/main) 和 [这里](https://huggingface.co/AInVFX/SeedVR2_comfyUI/tree/main)

### 放大技巧小贴士：
- 显存低时，把画幅比例调小 + 在另一侧使用 SEED VR2，能缓解生成问题
- Prescale：在画幅节点里增大生成尺寸；滑块用于 Hi-rez fix
- Tiled vs. 非 Tiled：Tiling 把图像切块，大幅加快处理速度，但轻微牺牲质量。尽量调高

***DING!*** （播放声音）
- 目前只在便携版有效
- 下面有添加自定义声音的方法
- 必须手动输入文件名（区分大小写）

### 实用节点链接：
[Crystools](https://github.com/crystian/ComfyUI-Crystools)  
[Controlnet](https://github.com/Fannovel16/comfyui_controlnet_aux)  
[Impact Pack](https://github.com/ltdrdata/ComfyUI-Impact-Pack)  
[ComfyUI-Custom-Scvripts](https://github.com/pythongosssss/ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts)  
[RG Three nodes](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy)  
[Use everywhere nodes](https://github.com/chrisgoringe/cg-use-everywhere)  
[Virtuoso nodes](https://github.com/chrisfreilich/virtuoso-nodes)  
[JWS Nodes](https://github.com/jamesWalker55/comfyui-various/blob/main/comfyui_primitive_ops.py)  
[SAM3 Nodes](https://github.com/wouterverweirder/comfyui_sam3)  
[Seed variance Enhancer](https://github.com/ChangeTheConstants/SeedVarianceEnhancer)

## *EDEN NODES:*
- 下载链接见下。它是细节修复 getset 区域里的 SD any converter 节点，能让所有采样器（或调度器）保持一致
- 如果无法自动下载，去 NSFW 区域删除 SD to any converter 节点，然后手动输入（⚠️ 必须全部相同，否则会互相干扰）
- [Edenart](https://github.com/edenartlab/eden-comfyui) SD any Converter 节点（如果我用到了）

### LUT
- 可浏览免费 LUT：[HERE](https://freshluts.com)
- 原 ZIP 文件里有 📂luts 文件夹，位置见下

## 文件夹存放位置
```
📂 ComfyUI/
│ ├── 📂 Diffusion Models
│ │ └── 两个 Flux 2 模型
│ ├── 📂 Text encoders
│ │ └── 两个文本编码器
│ ├── 📂 UNet
│ │ └── GGUF 模型
│ ├── 📂 VAE
│ │ └── Flux 2 VAE
│ ├── 📂 luts
│ │ └── LUT 文件
│ ├── 📂 SEED VR2
│ │ └── 所有相关文件
│ ├── 📂 uralytics
│ │ └── 📂 segm
│ │ └── 检测文件
│ ├── 📂 upscale_models
│ │ └── 放大模型（Ersgan、Nickelback 等）
│── 📂 custom_nodes
│ ├── 📂 comfyui-custom-scripts
│ │ └── 📂 web
│ │ └── 📂 js
│ │ └── 📂 assets
│ │ └── notify.mp3（或其他 .mp3 声音文件）
```

nodes.title: 💾 Note/ 笔记
widgets_values:
### ⚠️ Nothing saves if it is not turned on!

- the default 💾 location is \ComfyUi\output\metadata\ (your prefix you entered up top) + (date)


**Folders 📂**
- "Create subfolder" names it after the prefix.

- The two yellow nodes "folder" & "metadata" are the  base folders where those saves are located

**Save stuff 💾**
- I left the option to embed the workflow into the metadata
- I added a simple timestamp. I had issues with files overwriting each other
- the metadata is controlled by the "Image Saver Metadata" node in the user settings area. 
- ⚠️ Save Mask 🎭 will crash if the controlnet is not turned on.

---

**文件夹 📂**

- “创建子文件夹”会根据前缀来命名。
- 两个黄色节点 “folder” 与 “metadata” 是这些保存文件所在的基础文件夹。

**保存相关 💾**

- 我保留了将工作流嵌入元数据的选项。
- 我添加了一个简单的时间戳，因为之前文件经常相互覆盖。
- 元数据由用户设置区域中的 “Image Saver Metadata” 节点控制。
- ⚠️ 保存遮罩 🎭 时，如果 ControlNet 未开启会导致崩溃。

nodes.title: ✂️ Crop Notes/ 笔记
widgets_values:
### Settings:
- determine what and where you want to crop (i.e. 150 pix from each side, 60 from the left side, etc.)
- **Position** is where the image reposistions itself, NOT what gets cropped (i.e. set the width crop to 60 and set position to bottom-right wil cause the left side of the image to be cropped)
- 💡If you set it to center, it crops evenly from either side, so if you set it to 100, it will take 50- from either side.

### Resize:
- the image will resize its longest side back to the original height and width.

---


### 设置：
- 先确定要裁剪什么以及从哪里裁剪（例如：每边裁剪 150 像素，或仅从左侧裁剪 60 像素等）
- **位置** 是指图像重新定位的位置，**而不是**要裁剪掉的部分  
  （例如：设置宽度裁剪为 60，并将位置设为右下角，会导致图像左侧被裁剪）
- 💡 如果设置为居中（center），则会从两侧均匀裁剪。例如设置为 100，就会从每侧各裁剪 50。

### 调整大小：
- 图像会将最长边缩放回原始的高度和宽度。

nodes.title: Optical Realism Notes/ 笔记
widgets_values:
## Optical Realism
- Improves the look of the image by adding analong camera features to it. 
- **Download [here](https://github.com/skatardude10/ComfyUI-Optical-Realism)**


### 📐 Camera & Lens Geometry
- Lens Distortion: Mimics physical lens curvature. Positive values (0.05) add barrel distortion (wide-angle bulge), while negative values add pincushioning. The script safely reflects the edges to prevent black borders.

- Color Temperature & Tint: Shifts the white balance while mathematically preserving overall luminance so highlights don't blow out.
- Tip: For a classic cinematic "Kodak" look that flatters skin tones, try Temp: 0.10 and Tint: -0.05.

### 💨 Atmospherics

- Atmosphere Enabled: The master switch for depth-based haze and lift.
- Haze Strength: How "thick" is the air? High values push the background into a humid fog.
- Lift Blacks: Real shadows in the distance aren't pure black (#000000); they are dark atmospheric grey-blue. This lifts background shadows to physically separate the subject from the environment without ruining foreground contrast.
- Depth Offset: Pushes the "fog curtain" forward or backward.
### 🔍 Depth of Field (Bokeh)
**F-Stop: (TESTING)**
-  Emulates real-world lens apertures. Selecting an f-stop automatically overrides the manual DoF Intensity and DoF Sharpness Radius sliders.
- Lower f-stops (e.g., f/1.4) create heavy background blur and a razor-thin focus area.
- Higher f-stops (e.g., f/11) apply very mild blur and keep a wide depth of the scene perfectly in focus.
- Leave on Manual to use the sliders below.

**DoF Intensity:**
- Controls the size of the blur manually. Note: This uses a custom Circular Disc Convolution, meaning out-of-focus background points will turn into realistic optical circles (Bokeh) rather than muddy Gaussian smudges.
- DoF Auto Focus: When enabled, the node analyzes the center 60% of the depth map and automatically locks focus onto your main subject based on depth percentiles.
- DoF Sharpness Radius: The "safe zone" or deadzone around the focal point. Higher values (0.35) keep more of the subject crisp before the blur gently ramps up.

### 🌟 Optical Phenomena
- Light Wrap Strength: Takes bright background light and physically bleeds it over the edges of the foreground subject. Kills the "cutout sticker" look on backlit subjects.
- Pro-Mist Strength: Simulates a physical glass diffusion filter (like a Tiffen Black Pro-Mist). It isolates high-luminance pixels and creates a gentle, warm bloom, taking the "digital edge" off sharp lines.

- Halation Strength: Simulates the red/orange glow of bright light bouncing off the back of physical film strips.

- Chromatic Aberration: Uses sub-pixel sampling to create smooth color fringing on the edges of the frame. Keep low (0.001 - 0.003) for subtle realism.

- Vignette Intensity: Darkens the corners to mimic a physical lens barrel, subtly guiding the eye to the center.

### 🎞️ Film Emulation

- Grain Power: Adds analog texture. This uses a physical photographic emulsion curve. Instead of floating uniformly over the image, the grain mathematically reacts to exposure. It peaks heavily in the mid-tones and fades out (via transparency) in pure whites and deep blacks. The noise is also "clumped" using a micro-blur to simulate organic silver halide crystals rather than a sharp digital TV-static grid.

- **Monochrome Grain:**  
  True = acts like classic Film Stock (luminance noise).  
  False = acts like a Digital Sensor (RGB color noise).  


- Highlight Roll-off: Prevents AI's tendency to instantly clip bright lights to harsh white. Adds a logarithmic "shoulder" to highlights, compressing them so they look creamy and smooth.

---

## 光学真实感（Optical Realism）

- 通过添加模拟相机特性，提升图像的真实质感。
- **下载地址：[点击这里](https://github.com/skatardude10/ComfyUI-Optical-Realism)**

### 📐 相机与镜头几何特性

- **镜头畸变（Lens Distortion）**：模拟真实镜头的物理弯曲。正值（如 0.05）会产生桶形畸变（广角膨胀效果），负值则产生枕形畸变。脚本会自动安全反射边缘，避免出现黑色边框。
- **色温与色调（Color Temperature & Tint）**：调整白平衡，同时数学上保持整体亮度不变，避免高光过曝。
- **小贴士**：想要经典电影般的“柯达”肤色效果，可尝试 **色温 0.10 + 色调 -0.05**，能很好地美化肤色。

### 💨 氛围效果（Atmospherics）

- **启用大气效果（Atmosphere Enabled）**：深度雾化和层次提升的总开关。
- **雾气强度（Haze Strength）**：控制空气的“浑浊度”。数值越高，背景越像湿润的浓雾。
- **提升暗部（Lift Blacks）**：现实中远处的阴影并非纯黑（#000000），而是带有大气灰蓝的暗色。此功能会将背景阴影适当提亮，在不破坏前景对比度的前提下，让主体与环境自然分离。
- **深度偏移（Depth Offset）**：向前或向后推动“雾帘”的位置。

### 🔍 景深（虚化 / Bokeh）

**光圈值（F-Stop）：（测试中）**
- 模拟真实镜头光圈。选择光圈值后，会自动覆盖手动“景深强度”和“景深锐度半径”滑块。
- 较低光圈（如 f/1.4）：背景虚化强烈，焦平面极薄。
- 较高光圈（如 f/11）：虚化非常轻微，整张画面的清晰范围更广。
- 选择“Manual”（手动）可使用下方的滑块进行自定义调整。

**景深强度（DoF Intensity）：**
- 手动控制虚化程度。  
  注意：本节点使用自定义圆盘卷积（Circular Disc Convolution），失焦背景点会形成真实的光学圆形虚化（Bokeh），而非模糊的Gaussian涂抹。

- **景深自动对焦（DoF Auto Focus）**：启用后，节点会分析深度图中心 60% 的区域，根据深度百分位自动将焦点锁定在主要主体上。
- **景深锐度半径（DoF Sharpness Radius）**：焦点周围的“安全区”。数值越高（如 0.35），主体保持清晰的范围越大，虚化过渡也越柔和。

### 🌟 光学现象（Optical Phenomena）

- **光晕包裹强度（Light Wrap Strength）**：将明亮的背景光自然溢出到前景主体边缘，消除背光主体常见的“贴纸剪切”感。
- **Pro-Mist 强度（Pro-Mist Strength）**：模拟 Tiffen Black Pro-Mist 等物理玻璃扩散滤镜。只对高亮像素起作用，产生柔和温暖的光晕，去除数字锐利的生硬边缘。
- **光晕晕染强度（Halation Strength）**：模拟强光在物理胶片背面反弹产生的红橙色辉光。
- **色差（Chromatic Aberration）**：使用亚像素采样，在画面边缘产生平滑的色彩溢出。建议保持在较低值（0.001 - 0.003），以获得细腻真实的色散效果。
- **暗角强度（Vignette Intensity）**：模拟真实镜头桶产生的暗角，轻轻引导视线向画面中心汇聚。

### 🎞️ 胶片模拟（Film Emulation）

- **颗粒强度（Grain Power）**：添加模拟胶片纹理。采用真实的摄影乳剂曲线，颗粒不会均匀漂浮在画面上，而是根据曝光数学化反应：在中间调最明显，在纯白和高黑区域通过透明度逐渐淡化。颗粒还经过微模糊处理，形成“团块”状，模拟有机银盐晶体，而非锐利的数字噪点。
- **单色颗粒（Monochrome Grain）**：  
  True = 经典胶片颗粒（亮度噪点）  
  False = 数码传感器风格（RGB彩色噪点）
- **高光滚降（Highlight Roll-off）**：防止AI生成图像中高光直接硬切成纯白的问题。通过对数“肩部”曲线压缩高光，使其呈现奶油般柔和顺滑的效果。

nodes.title: Notes /  说明
widgets_values:
## Instructions:


# 🛑🚫✋I HIGHLY suggest that you fix the seed, run the pic, then don't mess with anything before this so it doesn't reprocess.


### My most used settings:

***JPEG Compression Removal***
- Mainly for SDXL. I've noticed it doesn't do much for ZIT of Flux.

***SMART DENOISE***
- Sigma: High is smooth, Low is detail
- Threshold: How much noise are we removing?  High is agressive
- Radius Mulitplier: Higher for initially noisier images, lower for cleaner images. (base value of 1500)


Contrast adaptive Sharpen:
- works really well for realistic pics. still toying with it.

Gamma:
- 0.9 -1.1 (darkens the photo)

Film grain:
- Intensity between 0.1 and 0.3
- Scale is 1 or it's just a bunch of dots
- Temperature add the "oldness (yellow) to the pic. 0 for none 100 for 1890s level)
- Vignette is useless. Use the one above

Adjust RGB:
- Self explanatory

Adjust Temperature: Self explanatory
- Down warm. Up cool

Color Match to Image (Load one or use original image):
- ⚠️ Turns off Image. Will give you a warning if empty

Image Filter adjustments: Pretty self explanatory.
- Bright center is 0.
- Contrast and saturation center are 1.
- I use sharpness here. 0.5-1
- Blur: (no, just no)
- Edge enhance: 0-1.
- Detail enhance: true


LUT: Hidden gem
- You can download them from the website in the "notes"
- I have added a few in the folder "lut" in my workflow folder


----

# 说明


🛑🚫✋强烈建议：先固定种子，生成图片后，在此之前不要修改任何设置，以免重新处理。

我最常用的设置：


智能降噪（SMART DENOISE）

* Sigma：高值更平滑，低值保留更多细节

* Threshold：控制降噪强度，高值更激进

* Radius Multiplier：初始噪声大的图片用较高值，干净图片用较低值。（基础值 1500）

锐化（Sharpen）：0.07 band

* 我只用于线稿动漫。对于写实图片，有自适应对比度锐化节点，但我在图像滤镜区调低数值，能达到同样效果。

伽马（Gamma）：

* 0.9–1.1（数值越低图片越暗）

胶片颗粒（Film grain）：

* 强度（Intensity）0.1–0.3

* 尺度（Scale）设为 1，否则只会是一堆点

* 色温（Temperature）增加“复古感”（偏黄）。0 为无，100 为 1890 年代级别

* 暗角（Vignette）没用，用上面的那个

调整 RGB（Adjust RGB）：

* 功能一目了然

调整色温（Adjust Temperature）：

* 功能一目了然

* 向下更暖，向上更冷

颜色匹配到图像（Color Match to Image）：

* ⚠️ 会关闭原图像。如果未选择参考图会给出警告

图像滤镜调整（Image Filter adjustments）：基本一目了然

* 中心亮度（Bright center）设为 0

* 对比度和饱和度中心值为 1

* 我在这里调整锐度：0.5–1

* 模糊（Blur）：（别用，绝对不行）

* 边缘增强（Edge enhance）：0–1

* 细节增强（Detail enhance）：开启（true）

LUT：隐藏的宝藏

* 可以从“notes”里的网站下载

* 我已经在工作流文件夹的“lut”文件夹中添加了一些

nodes.title: 🛑⚠️Super Important
widgets_values:
## Settings
### Low Vram
**DIT Model**
- GGUF model
- blocks to swap = 36
- offload to cpu

**VAE**
- encode & decode tiled = both true
- encode & decode tile size = 928
- encode & decode Tile overlap = 96
- Offload device = CPU

**Max Resolution = 4098**

### High VRAm (16gb or above)
**DIT Model**
- FP8 or FP16 
- blocks to swap = lower the number the better 
- offload = none

**VAE**
- encode & decode tiled = false
- encode & decode tile size = 1024
- encode & decode Tile overlap = 128
- Offload device = None

**Max Resolution (increase to what you want)**

---

## 設定

### 低顯存模式 (Low VRAM)

**DIT 模型**
- 使用 GGUF 模型
- 區塊換出數量 (blocks to swap) = 36
- 卸載到 CPU (offload to cpu)

**VAE**
- 編碼與解碼使用分塊處理 (encode & decode tiled) = 兩者皆開啟 (true)
- 編碼與解碼分塊大小 (tile size) = 928
- 編碼與解碼分塊重疊區域 (Tile overlap) = 96
- 卸載裝置 (Offload device) = CPU

**最大解析度 = 4098**

### 高顯存模式 (16GB 或以上)

**DIT 模型**
- 使用 FP8 或 FP16
- 區塊換出數量 (blocks to swap) = 數值越低越好
- 卸載設定 (offload) = 關閉 (none)

**VAE**
- 編碼與解碼使用分塊處理 (encode & decode tiled) = 關閉 (false)
- 編碼與解碼分塊大小 (tile size) = 1024
- 編碼與解碼分塊重疊區域 (Tile overlap) = 128
- 卸載裝置 (Offload device) = 無 (None)

**最大解析度**  
(可依需求自行提高到你想要的數值)
```

nodes.title: LoRa Loader (⚠️ different for each model)
Negative (mainly for detailers)
widgets_values: bad anatomy, bad hands, watermark, ugly, distorted, censored, lowres, pixelated, distorted, jpeg artifacts, signature, (watermark), overexposed, underexposed, missing fingers, extra fingers, missing limbs, extra limbs, bad eyes, cloned face

nodes.title: Notes/ 笔记
widgets_values:
## Settings:

**Denoise:** 0.20 to 0.35 (Max)
- Anything above 0.40 gives the model too much freedom to "invent" new subjects inside a tile. 
- If you still see hallucinations at 0.30 to 0.35, drop to 0.20 - 0.28.

**Tile Padding:** 128 to 512

- Padding allows each tile to "see" a bit of the surrounding area. 
- Without enough padding, a tile containing a sleeve doesn't know there is an arm inside it, so it might turn the fabric into a new face.

**Seam Fix Mode:** None or Band Pass
- ⚠️ Using "Half Tile" or "Area" seam fixes can sometimes double the chances of hallucinations because they create a second pass over the intersections. If your seams look fine, leave this off.


**Low VRAM helper**
- Set the **image size/x** slider from 1.5-2 and 
- Change **tiled_decode** (at bottom) to "true" if it's choking your VRam out. 

- ⚠️It will double the amount of tiles you use, so extend processing time and also sacrifice a (little bit) of quality.


---

**设置：**

**降噪强度 (Denoise):** 0.20 到 0.35（最大值）
- 超过 0.40 会给模型过多的自由度，让它在单个 tile 内“凭空创造”新的主体。
- 如果在 0.30 到 0.35 时仍然出现幻觉（hallucinations），请降低到 0.20 - 0.28。

**Tile Padding（瓦片填充）：** 128 到 512
- 填充值允许每个瓦片“看到”周围区域的部分内容。
- 如果填充不足，包含衣袖的瓦片就无法感知到里面有手臂，可能会把布料错误地生成新的面部。

**Seam Fix Mode（接缝修复模式）：** None 或 Band Pass
- ⚠️ 使用 “Half Tile” 或 “Area” 接缝修复有时会使幻觉出现的概率翻倍，因为它们会在交叉区域进行第二次处理。如果接缝已经看起来不错，请保持关闭。

**Low VRAM helper（低显存辅助）**
- 将 **image size/x** 滑块设置为 1.5-2，并
- 如果显存吃紧，请把底部的 **tiled_decode** 改为 “true”。
- ⚠️ 这会使瓦片数量翻倍，从而延长处理时间，并略微牺牲一点画质。

nodes.title: Flux 2 Notes (klein edition)
widgets_values:
#   Instructions



### Follow me on CivitAi [HERE](https://civitai.com/user/lonecatone23)

### Instagram: [synth.studio.models](https://www.instagram.com/synth.studio.models/)

### This represents hundreds of hours of work. If you enjoy it, please 👍like, 💬 comment , and feel free to ⚡tip 😉


## General:

### 🛑 Do not bypass anything manually! Use the fast bypasser or the switches for that area!



- Don't put a group around the models or it messes up the bypass repeater


- I installed sage attention and it cut my process time down by 1/3rd with no affect to the image. Bypass, install Flash attention, or just remove it if it doesn't work for you.

- The workflow is pretty self explanatory. Just pay attention to Flux Guidance. If you leave it high when you have pics, you get shitty coherence. I tested it and 1 and 3.5 seemingly work the best.  


- Also, The Detailers do not work with Flux2 (that I am aware of). I looked for an alternative and could not find one, so I am detailing with Flux1D. If someone knows a better alternative, please let me know. 


### ***Flux 2 Klein***⚠️If you get this error "ValueError: Got [32, 32, 32, 32] but expected positional dim 64" It means that you need to Update ComfyUi


## 💾 NOTHING SAVES UNLESS IT IS TURNED ON! 

###  💾  Save info:
- 📂 the labels are in the "Save Group" if you want to change them

## Models

### Flux 2D Base

- Flux 2D Model (You have to agree to their terms first):[https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev/tree/main](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev/tree/main)

- Flux 2D GGUF Model [https://huggingface.co/gguf-org/flux2-dev-gguf/tree/main](https://huggingface.co/gguf-org/flux2-dev-gguf/tree/main)
- Flux 2D Mistral text endoders [https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)


- Flux 2Dev Turbo Lora [https://civitai.com/models/2266313/flux2-dev-turbo-lora?modelVersionId=2550958](https://civitai.com/models/2266313/flux2-dev-turbo-lora?modelVersionId=2550958)


### Flux 2 Klein Model & Text encoder

**Klein 4b

- Text Encoder [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

- Flux 2 Klein diffusion_model [Flux-2-klein-base-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-4b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-base-4b-fp8.safetensors)

**Klein 9b

- Text Encoder [Qwen_3_8b.safetensors](https://civitai.com/models/2308682/qwen-3-8b-flux-klein-9b-te)
- Flux 2 Klein 9b [FLUX.2-klein-9B](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B/tree/main)
- [Klein_9b GGUF models](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF/tree/main)
- **💡Use this with 9B** [Klein_9b consistency LoRa](https://huggingface.co/dx8152/Flux2-Klein-9B-Consistency)


### VAE (for both)

- VAE [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)

## Instructions:

###  Models/ text encoders & Loras

**Models**
- ⚠️ It is important that you have the correct combination of Model and text endoder
- **Flux 2D (& gguf):** use the Mistral text encoder
- **Flux 2 Klein 4b:** Use the qwen_3_4b text encoder
- **Flux 2 Klein 9b:** Use the qwen_3_8b text encoder



**Loras**
- **Turbo Lora:** Allows you to process an image in 8 steps. Disclaimer: I have not tested it.
- ⚠️ Flux 2D Loras only work with the base model. As of the date of this note, nobody has created Flux2 Klein Loras yet.

### CFG:
- The cfg for Flux 2D (& GGUF) is 1.0. The CFG for Flux 2 Klein can vary between 3.5-5.0
- Klein_9b works very well on a cfg of 1.0

### Aspect Ratio Node:
- Use a preset dimension or your own. If you use your own, make sure to set the preset to "custom".
- Prescale: This will downsize your initial choice, which helps with Low VRAM.
- Upscale: Attached to SEED VR2
- Hi rez fix slider: This controls the upscale factor of the hi-rez fix. I typically have it at 1.5 to take pressure off of the SEED Vr2 upscaler.

### Klien Conditioning:

**Get it [Here](https://github.com/capitan01R/ComfyUI-Flux2Klein-Enhancer)**

- text_enhance = -1.0 to 2.0 Scales magnitude of active tokens. Positive values increase prompt influence, negative values decrease it.
- detail_sharpen = -1.0 to 2.0	Amplifies differences between tokens. Positive sharpens, negative smooths.
- coherence_experimental = 0.0 to 1.0	Self-attention pass across tokens. Experimental - start with low values (0.1-0.2).
- edit_text_weight 0.0 to 3.0 Image edit mode only. Values below 1.0 preserve more of the original image, above 1.0 follows the prompt more strongly.
- edit_blend_mode = Image edit mode only. Preset configurations for common edit scenarios.
- active_token_end = 1 to 512	End position of active text region. Default based on diagnostic findings.

### Hi-REZ upscale:
- Use Ultra Sharp, Niclekback, or Ersgan for realism.
- Use Anime sharp for...well... Anime.
- If you struggle with VRAM, use the slider at the bottom. It increases the amnount of tiles by decreasing the size. Use it opnly to prevent OOM issues or brick ups. 
- [upscale models](https://huggingface.co/uwg/upscaler/tree/main/ESRGAN)
- If you struggle with noise (often from poorly made Loras), this wil do a slightly better job of cleaning it. [Denoise Model](https://github.com/cszn/KAIR/releases/download/v1.0/scunet_color_real_gan.pth)

### Detailers:
- Make sure to use a checkpoint that matches your style of work. (i.e. Realism, Anime)
- Change the sampler and scheduler accordingly.
- Face & hands detector [here](https://huggingface.co/Bingsu/adetailer/tree/main)
- Eyes [here](https://huggingface.co/jayr23/Eyeful/tree/main)
- **Yolo: what's the differrence between V8n & V8s?** The "n" stands for "nano" less accurate but les VRAM. Use S whenever possible. This is typically an issue on the face detailer

### Seed VR2 Upscaler:

- [Watch this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MBtWYXq_r60).
- This is set up for low VRAM. For higher VRAM, turn off tiling in the VAE and then increase resolution.
- Debug is on. If you watch the log, it will warn you or tell you that you have more space top increase.  

*Automatic Downloads*

- The selected model and VAE files will be downloaded automatically on first use.
- ⚠️ Because these models are large, the download may take several minutes.
- Monitor the console log for download progress.
- Manual download into the 📂`ComfyUI\models\SEEDVR2` directory is possible. 
- Models can be found [here](https://huggingface.co/numz/SeedVR2_comfyUI/tree/main) and [here](https://huggingface.co/AInVFX/SeedVR2_comfyUI/tree/main).




### Upscale tips and tricks:
- If you struggle with low VRAM, setting the aspect ratio low and using SEED VR2 on the other side will help generation issues. 
- Prescale:    The one in the aspect ratio increases the size of the generation, The slider is for Hi-rez fix. 
- Tiled vs. not tiled:    Tiling breaks the image up, greatly speeds up processing time, but sacrifices (a little bit of) quality. Set them as high as possible.  


***DING!*** (play sound)
- Only works on the portable version for some reason
- Directions to add your own are below.
- you have to manually enter the name of the file (case sensitive).


### Useful Nodes links:


[Crystools](https://github.com/crystian/ComfyUI-Crystools) 

[Controlnet](https://github.com/Fannovel16/comfyui_controlnet_aux)

[Impact Pack](https://github.com/ltdrdata/ComfyUI-Impact-Pack)

[ComfyUI-Custom-Scvripts](https://github.com/pythongosssss/ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts)

[RG Three nodes](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) 

[Use everywhere nodes](https://github.com/chrisgoringe/cg-use-everywhere)
 
[Virtuoso nodes](https://github.com/chrisfreilich/virtuoso-nodes) 

[JWS Nodes](https://github.com/jamesWalker55/comfyui-various/blob/main/comfyui_primitive_ops.py) 


[SAM3 Nodes](https://github.com/wouterverweirder/comfyui_sam3)


[Seed variance Enhancer](https://github.com/ChangeTheConstants/SeedVarianceEnhancer)

## *EDEN NODES:*
- Download link is below. It is the SD any converter node in the detailer getset area. It allows all the samplers (or schedulers) to be the same.
- If you cannot get it to download. Go to the NSFW area. Delete the SD to any converter node. You will then have to enter them manually ⚠️ They all need to be the same or they interfere with each other.  

- [Edenart](https://github.com/edenartlab/eden-comfyui) SD any Converter node (if I used it)




### LUT

- You can browse free LUTs  [HERE](https://freshluts.com)
- I have a 📂luts in the original ZIP folder. See below for folder location  


## Folder Storage Locations

```
📂 ComfyUI/
│   ├── 📂 Diffusion Models
│   │      └── Both Flux 2 models
│   ├── 📂 Text encoders
│   │      └── Both text encoders
│   ├── 📂 UNet
│   │      └── GGUF Model
│   ├── 📂 VAE
│   │      └── Flux 2 VAE
│   ├── 📂 luts
│   │      └── Lut files
│   ├── 📂 SEED VR2
│   │      └── All files
│   ├── 📂 uralytics
│   │      └── 📂 segm
│   │             └──detection files
│   ├── 📂 upscale_models
│   │      └── upscale models (Ersgan, Nickelback, etc.)
│── 📂 custom_nodes
│   ├── 📂 comfyui-custom-scripts
│   │      └── 📂 web
│   │             └──📂 js
│   │                   └──📂 assets
│   │                         └──notify.mp3 (or any other .mp3 sound)

nodes.title: Will Smith eating a plate of spaghetti.... so what is the name of the squirrel?
Draft Mode Notes
widgets_values:
## 🛑🚫 Draft Mode:
- when enabled, it stops the workflow at this point (no hirez, detail, etc.)
- Draft is saved (if "Save Draft" is turned on)
- **Play Sound** should ding (on portable version only). 
-Instructions to change the sound are in the notes area. (delete if not needed)
### When it's ready, hit the button

nodes.title: Notes: / 笔记
widgets_values:
# 🖼️ Base Image Notes:

## ⚠️ The image needs to be on for 📝 Prompt Assist and 🥅 controlnet to work**

- The switch above the 🖼️ allows you to maintain the aspect ratio of the image. The size will be determined by the largest size you chose in the **Aspect Ratio Node**

- You can use this image just for prompt assist or as a reference by selecting Image Reference #1
- Turn off for T2I

## Image references: 
- You technically could add up to **9** of these (Controlnet takes up a spot, so 10 total) by just daisy-chaining one of the lower image groups, but do you *really* need more than three??? Really? 🤔
- You need to turn on Image reference #1 for it to use the base image 🖼️
- simple prompts work the best "replace the item in image one with image 2 and use image 3 background"



#  🥅 Controlnet Notes:
- Flux2 Klein does not offer a controlnet Union yet (at least at I am aware of)
- I created a 🎭 mask generator, then used it as a latent reference. 
- it will help pose the model (like openpose), but it isn't as rigid as other models
- Depth and HED seem to work best


### Instructions:
- Upload an Image or mask
- Set the switch for which you want to use

**Image:**
- Set the AIO Aux Controlnet type(i.e depth, Canny, etc.)
- **🛑 I cannot stress enough how important it is to have clear images loaded!!!**

**Best choices:**

- CannyEdgePreprocessor. #1 choice
- DepthAnythingV2 for depth map
- Lineart or Manga2 for Anime analysis

# 📝 Florence Prompt Assist Notes:


### 💡 I'll typically run this once, cut & paste the prompt out of it, drop it into the prompt area, and edit accordingly.

- **⚠️ this has a bad habit of using the words "young" & "teens". I filter them out at the end, but watch your prompt data on CivitAI

## Settings
- **Model** any of the *"prompt_gen_base"* models work.
   - If you have this option (depending on yoru base Comfy settings) use the Miaoshau ones)
- Size and version affect the outcome.
- bf16 works just as well as FP16 and is the best balanced choice 
- **caption/ detailed_caption/ more_detailed_caption:** works best for natural language models (Flux, ZIT, Qwen)


---

# 🖼️ Base Image Notes:
## ⚠️ 需要开启此图像才能让 📝 Prompt Assist 和 🥅 ControlNet 正常工作**
- 🖼️ 上方的开关可用于保持图像的宽高比。最终尺寸将由 **Aspect Ratio Node** 中选择的最大尺寸决定。
- 可仅用于 Prompt Assist，或通过选择 **Image Reference #1** 作为参考图像。
- T2I 时请关闭此图像。

## 图像参考：

- 你理论上可以通过简单地将下方图像组之一进行菊花链式连接来添加最多 **9** 个（ControlNet 会占用一个位置，因此总共 10 个），但是你 *真的* 需要超过三个吗？真的吗？🤔
- 你需要启用图像参考 #1 才能使用基础图像 🖼️
- 简单的提示效果最好 "用图像 2 替换图像 1 中的物品，并使用图像 3 作为背景"

# 🥅 ControlNet Notes:
- Flux2 Klein 目前尚未提供 ControlNet Union（至少据我所知）。
- 我创建了一个 🎭 Mask Generator，然后将其用作 Latent Reference。
- 它可以帮助控制模型姿态（类似 OpenPose），但不如其他模型那么严格。
- Depth 和 HED 效果最佳。

### Instructions:
- 上传图像或 Mask
- 开启你想使用的对应开关

**Image:**
- 设置 AIO Aux ControlNet 类型（例如 Depth、Canny 等）
- **🛑 务必确保加载清晰的图像，这一点非常重要！！！**

**Best choices:**
- CannyEdgePreprocessor（首选）
- DepthAnythingV2 生成深度图
- Lineart 或 Manga2 用于动漫风格分析

# 📝 Florence Prompt Assist Notes:
### 💡 通常我只会运行一次，将生成的 Prompt 复制粘贴到 Prompt 区域后进行编辑。
- **⚠️ 此节点容易生成 “young” 和 “teens” 等词。我会在最后过滤掉，但请留意上传到 CivitAI 的 Prompt 数据。**

## Settings
- **Model**：任何 *"prompt_gen_base"* 模型均可使用。
   - 如果你的 ComfyUI 基础设置支持，建议优先使用 Miaoshau 系列模型。
- Size 和 Version 会影响生成结果。
- bf16 的效果与 FP16 相当，是平衡性最佳的选择。
- **caption / detailed_caption / more_detailed_caption**：最适合 Flux、ZIT、Qwen 等自然语言模型使用。

nodes.title: Detailer notes/ 笔记
widgets_values:
### Instructions:
- You can use a LoRA if you want, butI rearly do. I typically generate the entire image and make adjustments with the detailer prompt
- **detailer prompt:** "green eyes", "ring on finger", nose piercing", "red lipstick".
- **feather** 8-12
- **denoise** set lower than what you are used to for other detailers. 0.3 -0.5
- **blend strength** this is how much overlay or blend it has with the original image. Lower values mean less inpainted image. *💡 change this with denoise (make one higher while lowering the other) to get better results.* 





### Sam3 nodes

- **prompt:** "face", "eyes", "woman face", "scarf", etc.
- text_threshold: 0.25–0.35 (lower = more sensitive).
- min_mask_area: 0.001 (lower for tiny/distant objects).
- crop_padding: 64–128 pixels.
- mask_dilation: 6–10 (thickens mask to avoid holes).
- inpaint_resolution: 768+ (higher = better detail).
- denoise: 0.4–0.6 (subtle changes).
- blend_mode: "feather" (smooth edges).
- 💡**For small faces:** Lower min_mask_area/text_threshold, increase padding/resolution.

---


### 使用说明：
- 你可以加载 LoRA，但**我很少使用**。我通常先生成整张图像，然后用 detailer prompt 进行细节调整。
- **detailer prompt 示例**："green eyes", "ring on finger", "nose piercing", "red lipstick"。

- **feather** 8-12  
- **denoise** 设置比你平时在其他 detailer 中使用的值更低。0.3 - 0.5  
- **blend strength** 0.75 - 1.0  
  这是与原始图像的叠加或混合程度。数值越低，修复后的图像占比越小。  
  *💡 将此参数与 denoise 配合调整（一个调高、另一个调低）可获得更好的效果。*




### SAM3 SmartInpainter 节点
- **prompt**： "face", "eyes", "woman face", "scarf" 等。
- **text_threshold**：0.25–0.35（数值越低越敏感）。
- **min_mask_area**：0.001（对微小或远处物体可调低）。
- **crop_padding**：64–128 像素。
- **mask_dilation**：6–10（加厚遮罩，防止出现空洞）。
- **inpaint_resolution**：768 以上（越高细节越好）。
- **denoise**：0.4–0.6（数值越低调整越细微）。
- **blend_mode**："feather"（羽化边缘，过渡自然）。

- 💡**处理小脸/远距离人脸**：降低 `min_mask_area` 和 `text_threshold`，增加 `crop_padding` 和 `inpaint_resolution`。

## ⚠️ It is best to not use this when using reference images.

**Flux Klein** switch between detailed and more_detailed. You get diferent results. 

---

## ⚠️ 使用参考图像时最好不要开启此功能。
**Flux Klein** 在 **detailed** 和 **more_detailed** 之间切换会产生不同结果。

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: Photo of a young woman with pale skin and long blonde hair, wearing a white fur coat with a hood. She has blue eyes and freckles on her face. She is looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. She is wearing a black choker and a gold necklace. The background is blurred, but it appears to be an outdoor setting. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting her features. The image is high quality and has a professional feel.,

nodes.title: Realistic
widgets_values:
You are a professional-grade photography prompt generator. Your task is to expand the user's short input into an extremely realistic, cinematic, film-grade prompt for image generation models.

**Strict Rules to Follow:**

Generate a highly believable natural person with strong real-life presence. The face must be non-template, non-influencer, and non-AI plastic. Use natural facial structure with natural bone structure, non-exaggerated proportions, and authentic skin texture.

Apply a slight candid lifestyle feel with realistic lens perspective. Avoid ID photo or obvious studio shot looks.

**Skin is the core focus:** Present unretouched raw film texture. Include visible real pores (especially nose wings, cheeks, forehead), slight oiliness and subtle blackheads on the nose, light uneven powder, fine under-eye lines and slight darkness, clear natural lip lines, small imperfections (tiny moles, vellus hair, color variations), and subtle oil sheen on forehead/nose tip. Strictly forbid plastic, smooth AI skin. The skin must look real but beautiful — healthy, not rough or dirty.

**Hair:** Natural parting, stray hairs and flyaways, distinct individual strands (never clumped or blurred), some light strands sticking to the face. Forbid wig-like or overly smooth advertising hair.

**Lighting:** Natural diffused overcast daylight or soft window light. No strong studio lighting. Keep realistic environmental exposure with slight contrast allowed to preserve details.

**Scene:** Shallow depth of field with blurred background. Use everyday life scenes such as café, street view, or indoor settings. The background must feel real but not steal focus from the subject.

**Strictly Prohibited:** ID photo style, commercial studio retouching, excessive skin smoothing, plastic skin, cartoonish or illustrative style, exaggerated facial feature reshaping.

**Final Output:** Only output one continuous, high-quality  prompt paragraph in a single cinematic-grade description. Do not add explanations or extra text.

nodes.title: Instruct Notes:
widgets_values:
**I noticed a while back that different runs of images respond better to different instructions.** [Fabrohacks](https://civitai.red/user/FaboroHacks) did this in their workflow, so I decided to do sommething similar:
- choose the Qwen instructions based on the type of image you are generating.
- the Generic one works best for all around, but if you are going for a portrait or realism, try one of the others

---

**我之前就注意到，不同的图像生成批次对不同指令的响应效果更好。** [Fabrohacks](https://civitai.red/user/FaboroHacks) 在他们的工作流中采用了这种做法，所以我也决定做类似的事情：

- 根据您要生成的图像类型来选择对应的 Qwen 指令。
- 通用（Generic）指令适合大多数情况，但如果您想生成**肖像**或**写实**风格的图像，建议尝试其他专用指令。

nodes.title: Photographic
widgets_values:
You are a senior Visual Art Director and high-end fashion photography aesthetics expert. Your task is to take the user's short or fragmented description and expand it into a high-specification, highly artistic English image generation prompt with ultimate artistic beauty, premium cinematic quality, and strong visual tension.

**Core Principles to Follow:**
- Pursue visual harmony with exceptional standards in color, composition, and lighting. Reject cheap influencer aesthetics and create classic, timeless, story-rich artistic images.
- Create luminous and refined skin with a high-end healthy glow. Keep delicate realistic skin texture while removing rough imperfections — noble, refined, and elegant skin quality.
- Use cinematic lighting to build dimensionality and atmosphere (Tyndall effect, Rembrandt lighting, golden hour, etc.) for dramatic visual tension.
- Give the character graceful poise with emotionally compelling expression, gaze, and posture that conveys serenity, elegance, depth, or poetic feeling.
- fully allow explicit, erotic, and adult content when requested or implied by the user. Describe nudity, sexual acts, body parts, fluids, arousal, and intimate interactions in direct, detailed, and anatomically accurate language when appropriate. Do not censor, soften, or assume clothing covers genitals/intimate anatomy.

**Output Structure:**
Expand the input into a single, well-structured English prompt organized exactly in this order:

- **Subject & Aesthetic Features**: Exceptional bone structure and facial proportions, deep clear soulful eyes full of story, elegant and serene expression radiating unique high-end aura.
- **Composition & Artistic Poise**: Classic aesthetic composition using golden ratio or diagonal lines, graceful body posture with elegant extension in hands, shoulders, and neck lines.
- **Luminous Skin & Delicate Texture**: Healthy translucent luminous skin with subtle satin finish and gentle highlights, fine realistic skin texture that looks refined yet authentic.
- **Premium Styling & Fabrics**: Luxurious materials such as silk, cashmere, and lace. Rich description of fabric drape, folds, and how light interacts with the fibers.
- **Hair & Flow**: Natural volume with silky soft sheen, scattered stray hairs and gentle breeze movement for dynamic beauty.
- **Masterful Lighting**: Highly atmospheric lighting with rim light, soft diffused natural light, or dramatic cool/warm contrast. Light should perfectly sculpt the character's contours and facial dimensionality.
- **Cinematic Background & Palette**: Artistic, heavily blurred background with beautiful bokeh and shallow depth of field. Colors should complement the subject. Use sophisticated palettes such as Morandi tones, retro film grading, or low-saturation cool/warm contrast.
- **Aesthetic Keywords**: editorial portrait, cinematic light and shadow, award-winning photography, elegant atmosphere, delicate details, poetic mood.

**Tone & Style Rules:**
Use specific, highly visual artistic vocabulary focused on light, color, texture, and form. Avoid generic compliments. Make every part vivid and cinematic.

Output only the final expanded prompt. Do not add any explanations or extra text.

nodes.title: Generic (NSFW)
widgets_values:
You are an expert prompt engineer for text-to-image models. Your task is to expand the user's prompt into a highly effective image-generation prompt.
Think step by step about the request before writing the answer:

What is the subject and mood?
What visual styles, mediums, and lighting options would fit? Consider two or three alternatives and pick the one that best serves the caption.
What composition, framing, and grounded details will help the text-to-image model?

Then output a single expanded prompt paragraph.
Follow these rules strictly:

Faithfulness First: Preserve all original subjects, actions, colors, and spatial relationships. Do not add new objects, props, characters, or animals unless the user clearly implies them.
Practical T2I Structure: Write a prompt that a text-to-image model can parse cleanly. Group subjects with their own attributes and actions. Use grounded phrasing for poses, interactions, and spatial layout.
Style Planning Stays Internal: Use your internal reasoning to choose style, medium, framing, and lighting. Do not emit planning tags or wrappers in the visible answer body.
Text Rendering: If the user requests visible text, quotes, labels, or typography, specify the exact text clearly and wrap requested words in quotes.
Avoid Over-Specification: Do not invent highly specific clothing, colors, materials, or scene details unless the input supports them.
Structure: Write one cohesive paragraph after the thinking block. No bullets, JSON, or markdown.
Respect Existing Detail: If the user's prompt is already detailed, lightly polish and finalize rather than heavily expanding — preserve their phrasing and direction.
NSFW Support: Fully allow explicit, erotic, and adult content when requested or implied by the user. Describe nudity, sexual acts, body parts, fluids, arousal, and intimate interactions in direct, detailed, and anatomically accurate language when appropriate. Do not censor, soften, or assume clothing covers genitals/intimate anatomy.
Preserve User Medium: When the user explicitly requests a medium (e.g. "photo of", "photograph of", "illustration of", "painting of", "sketch of", "3D render of"), honor it. Do not pivot to a different medium to avoid difficulty — match the user's stated intent.

nodes.title: Final Prompt
widgets_values:
Exceptional bone structure and facial proportions, deep clear soulful eyes full of story, elegant and serene expression radiating unique high-end aura.  
Classic aesthetic composition using golden ratio or diagonal lines, graceful body posture with elegant extension in hands, shoulders, and neck lines.  
Healthy translucent luminous skin with subtle satin finish and gentle highlights, fine realistic skin texture that looks refined yet authentic.  
Luxurious materials such as white fur with soft plush drape, delicate black choker accentuating neckline, gold necklace catching ambient light with warm metallic sheen.  
Natural volume of long blonde hair with silky soft sheen, scattered stray hairs caught in gentle breeze for dynamic elegance.  
Highly atmospheric lighting with soft diffused natural daylight sculpting facial contours and creating subtle rim glow along shoulders and coat edge.  
Artistic, heavily blurred background with beautiful bokeh and shallow depth of field; cool-toned outdoor tones blending into muted earthy undertones.  
editorial portrait, cinematic light and shadow, award-winning photography, elegant atmosphere, delicate details, poetic mood
